productDisplayName: Spykar Men Style Essentials Kns 0542 Blue Jeans
description: Composition Blue skinny jeans made of 98% cotton and 2% spandex with heavy wash look and creasing, has two insert pockets on the front sides, two patch pockets on the back with embroidered detailing, brand patch appliqued on the waistband at the back and metal zipper and button closure Fit Low waist, tight fit Wash care Wash and dry separately Wash inside out in mild detergent Do not bleach Dry under shade Take edgy dressing to the next level in these distressed blue skinny jeans from spykar. The low waisted jeans in blue are perfect for casual outings with friends. Team this pair with grunge tees and leather vests with leather boots for a great rocker look. Model statistics The model wears jeans of length 41.5" Height: 6.1' Waist: 31"
